zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Curt於1597年1月在瑞士波藍根塔爾受洗時，她的父親Peter Curett33歲，母親Cathrin Gerber29歲。她於1616年12月2日與Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler在瑞士波藍根塔爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和12個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Curt于1597年1月在瑞士波藍根塔爾受洗时，她的父亲Peter Curett33岁，母亲Cathrin Gerber29岁。她于1616年12月2日与Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler在瑞士波藍根塔爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和12个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Curt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Frieda.

variants.name: Curto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Sal, Fausto, Giovanni, Carmelo, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Gioacchino, Marcello, Michelangelo.

Italian (southern), Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for a short man, from southern Italian curtu, curto, Spanish and Portuguese curto ‘short’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short; broken off’).
Catalan (Curtó): from a diminutive of Curt .

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.description: All European peace treaty formally accepts Switzerland as an independent nation.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Curt was christened in January 1597, in Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland, her father, Peter Curett, was 33 and her mother, Cathrin Gerber, was 29. She married Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler on 2 December 1616, in Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 12 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Curt a été baptisée en janvier 1597, à Langenthal, Berne, Suisse, son père, Peter Curett, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Cathrin Gerber, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler le 2 décembre 1616, à Langenthal, Berne, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 12 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Curt im Januar 1597 in Langenthal, Bern, Schweiz getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Curett 33 und ihre Mutter Cathrin Gerber 29. Sie hat am 2. Dezember 1616 in Langenthal, Bern, Schweiz Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 12 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Curt è stato battezzato nel gennaio 1597 nel Langenthal, Berna, Svizzera, sua padre, Peter Curett, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Cathrin Gerber, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler il 2 dicembre 1616, nel Langenthal, Berna, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 12 figlie.

スイスバーンランジェンサル
ja.Langenthal, Bern, Switz: スイスバーンランジェンサル
ja.Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland: スイスバーンランジェンサル
ja.lifeSummary: Anna Curtが1597年1月にスイスバーンランジェンサルで洗礼を受けた時，父Peter Curettは33歳，母Cathrin Gerberは29歳であった。1616年12月2日にスイスバーンランジェンサルでHans Cunrad Mumenthalerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Curt(이)가 1597년 1월 스위스 버 랭솔에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Curett(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cathrin Gerber(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1616년 12월 2일 스위스 버 랭솔에서 Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Curt foi batizada em janeiro de 1597, em Langenthal, Bern, Suiça, seu pai, Peter Curett, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Cathrin Gerber, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler em 2 de dezembro de 1616, em Langenthal, Bern, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 12 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Curt была крещена январь 1597 г. в местности лангентэл, бирн, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Peter Curett было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Cathrin Gerber, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler 2 декабря 1616 г. в местности лангентэл, бирн, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 12 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Curt se bautizó en enero de 1597, en Langenthal, Bern, Suiza, su papá, Peter Curett, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Cathrin Gerber, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Hans Cunrad Mumenthaler el 2 de diciembre de 1616, en Langenthal, Bern, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 12 hijas.
